{"title": "Why Your Code Breaks in Docker", "description": "One project worked on my laptop, completely failed in a container — same code, different environment. I didn't lose time because Python was hard. I lost time because the setup was sloppy. Treat environments like engineering, not cleanup. #DataScience #Python #Shorts", "tags": ["python environments", "docker python", "data science setup", "virtual environments", "python beginners", "AI projects", "reproducible code"]}
